ast.target: [AcpClient] 代理返回了 end_turn 但没有会话更新（对于某些命令可能是预期的）

ast.target: [AcpClient] 配置选项已设置。更新后的选项：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to Node.js. Usually leave blank. Only needed if node is in a non-standard location (enter absolute path, e.g. /usr/local/bin/node).
ast.target: Node.js 路径。通常留空。仅当 Node 位于非标准位置时需要（输入绝对路径，例如 /usr/local/bin/node）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the keyboard shortcut to send messages. Note: If using Cmd/Ctrl+Enter, you may need to remove any hotkeys assigned to Cmd/Ctrl+Enter (Settings → Hotkeys).
ast.target: 选择发送消息的键盘快捷键。注意：如果使用 Cmd/Ctrl+Enter，您可能需要移除分配给 Cmd/Ctrl+Enter 的热键（设置 → 热键）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include the current note in your messages automatically. The agent will have access to its content without typing @notename.
ast.target: 自动将当前笔记包含在您的消息中。代理将可以访问其内容而无需输入 @notename。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum characters per mentioned note. Notes longer than this will be truncated.
ast.target: 每个提及笔记的最大字符数。超过此长度的笔记将被截断。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum characters for text selection in auto-mention. Selections longer than this will be truncated.
ast.target: 自动提及中文本选择的最大字符数。超过此长度的选择将被截断。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to open new chat views
ast.target: 在哪里打开新的聊天视图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display emoji icons in tool calls, thoughts, plans, and terminal blocks.
ast.target: 在工具调用、思考、计划和终端块中显示表情符号图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically collapse diffs that exceed the line threshold.
ast.target: 自动折叠超过行阈值的差异。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Diffs with more lines than this will be collapsed by default.
ast.target: 行数超过此值的差异将默认折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the floating chat button and draggable chat windows.
ast.target: 启用浮动聊天按钮和可拖动聊天窗口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL or path to an image for the floating button. Leave empty for default icon.
ast.target: 浮动按钮图像的 URL 或路径。留空以使用默认图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically allow all permission requests from agents. ⚠️ Use with caution - this gives agents full access to your system.
ast.target: 自动允许来自代理的所有权限请求。⚠️ 谨慎使用 - 这将赋予代理对您系统的完全访问权限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show OS notifications when the agent completes a response or requests permission. Notifications are suppressed while Obsidian is focused.
ast.target: 当代理完成响应或请求权限时显示操作系统通知。当 Obsidian 处于焦点时，通知将被抑制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run agents inside Windows Subsystem for Linux. Recommended for agents like Codex that don't work well in native Windows environments.
ast.target: 在 Linux 的 Windows 子系统 (WSL) 中运行代理。推荐用于在原生 Windows 环境中运行不佳的代理（如 Codex）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify WSL distribution name (leave empty for default). Example: Ubuntu, Debian
ast.target: 指定 WSL 发行版名称（留空以使用默认值）。例如：Ubuntu、Debian

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where chat exports will be saved
ast.target: 聊天导出保存的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for exported filenames. Use {date} for date and {time} for time
ast.target: 导出文件名的模板。使用 {date} 表示日期，{time} 表示时间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to add to exported notes. Supports nested tags (e.g., projects/agent-client). Leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 添加到导出笔记的标签。支持嵌套标签（例如 projects/agent-client）。留空以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include images in exported markdown files
ast.target: 在导出的 Markdown 文件中包含图片

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path for exported images (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 导出图片的文件夹路径（相对于库根目录）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically export the current chat when starting a new chat
ast.target: 开始新聊天时自动导出当前聊天

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically export the current chat when closing the chat view
ast.target: 关闭聊天视图时自动导出当前聊天

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the exported note after exporting
ast.target: 导出后自动打开导出的笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug logging to console. Useful for development and troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用控制台调试日志。适用于开发和故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which agent is used when opening a new chat view.
ast.target: 选择打开新聊天视图时使用的代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gemini API key. Required if not logging in with a Google account. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: Gemini API 密钥。如果未使用 Google 账户登录则为必填项。（以纯文本存储）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to the Gemini CLI. Use just "gemini" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path for a specific version.
ast.target: Gemini CLI 的命令名称或路径。仅使用 "gemini" 让登录 shell 解析它，或输入特定版本的绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one argument per line. Leave empty to run without arguments.(Currently, the Gemini CLI requires the "--experimental-acp" option.)
ast.target: 每行输入一个参数。留空以无参数运行。（目前，Gemini CLI 需要 "--experimental-acp" 选项。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. Required to authenticate with Vertex AI. GEMINI_API_KEY is derived from the field above.(Stored as plain text)
ast.target: 每行输入一个 KEY=VALUE 对。通过 Vertex AI 进行身份验证时需要。GEMINI_API_KEY 派生自上述字段。（以纯文本存储）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Anthropic API key. Required if not logging in with an Anthropic account. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: Anthropic API 密钥。如果未使用 Anthropic 账户登录则为必填项。（以纯文本存储）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to claude-agent-acp. Use just "claude-agent-acp" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: claude-agent-acp 的命令名称或路径。仅使用 "claude-agent-acp" 让登录 shell 解析它，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one argument per line. Leave empty to run without arguments.
ast.target: 每行输入一个参数。留空以无参数运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is derived from the field above.
ast.target: 每行输入一个 KEY=VALUE 对。ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 派生自上述字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: OpenAI API key. Required if not logging in with an OpenAI account. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: OpenAI API 密钥。如果未使用 OpenAI 账户登录则为必填项。（以纯文本存储）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to codex-acp. Use just "codex-acp" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: codex-acp 的命令名称或路径。仅使用 "codex-acp" 让登录 shell 解析它，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. OPENAI_API_KEY is derived from the field above.
ast.target: 每行输入一个 KEY=VALUE 对。OPENAI_API_KEY 派生自上述字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unique identifier used to reference this agent.
ast.target: 用于引用此代理的唯一标识符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to the custom agent. Use just the command name to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: 自定义代理的命令名称或路径。仅输入命令名称以让登录 shell 解析，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: 输入 KEY=VALUE 对，每行一个。（以纯文本存储）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 适用于 Linux 的 Windows 子系统
